name: cortex
description: Cortex cognitive control-plane service. Phase 0 captures the service boundary and transport contract without taking over LLM execution yet.

tools.name: cortex.describe_boundary
tools.description: Describe Cortex boundaries, ownership, transport, and current implementation scope.

tools.name: cortex.step
tools.description: Execute one Cortex Phase 1 reasoning step. Loads the system prompt from OpenAgent config, combines it with user input, calls the configured LLM provider, and returns plain response text without tool use or planning.

session_id.description: Stable session identifier for this turn

user_input.description: Raw user message to send to Cortex

agent_name.description: Optional configured agent name. Defaults to the first configured agent.
